description: Area of the segmented abalone in milometers squared
Pixels-per-millimetre scale factor derived from the ColorChecker card
Detected photo layout: 'side_by_side' (vertical divider, card and abalone in opposite halves) or 'stacked' (horizontal divider, card above abalone)
Flag populated when length_mm falls outside the plausible biological range (60-130 mm) and blank if within range. Flagged rows are not excluded and require manual review
